torch_pattern: output = torch.permute(input, (0, 2, 1, 3)).contiguous(); output = torch.reshape(output, (batch_size, sequence_size, num_heads * head_size)).contiguous()
applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: output = ttnn.transformer.concatenate_heads(input, memory_config={OUTPUT_MEMCFG}); constraints: ['input must be 4D [batch, num_heads, seq, head_size]', 'head_size must be a multiple of 32 (else pad head dim and matmul-side weights)', 'input must be TILE_LAYOUT']; fusion_notes: Replaces the permute(0,2,1,3)+reshape subsequence immediately after attention scores @ V (or SDPA); output feeds the attention output projection linear.

placement_observations.source: BERT-style attention: memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, consumed by ttnn.linear self_output in L1

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [batch, seq, hidden] feeding block-sharded out-proj linear
placement_observations.source: ViT/SD-style: memory_config=ttnn.L1_BLOCK_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG, then reshard to block-sharded 64/120-core grid for out-proj
Falcon/LLM attention selfout: memory_config=model_config['CONCAT_HEADS_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'], output to SELFOUT_MM
unit test: MemoryConfig(INTERLEAVED, BufferType.DRAM) when input height-sharded L1; default/no memory_config in DiT/T5 TP call sites (DRAM interleaved before all_gather)
